description: S-tag: 15-aa N-terminal fragment of bovine RNase A (mature residues 1-15) used as a protein affinity and detection tag via high-affinity reconstitution with S-protein

references.title: Ribonuclease S-peptide as a carrier in fusion proteins

references.authors: Raines RT, McCormick M, Van Oosbree TR, Mierendorf RC
references.title: The S·Tag fusion system for protein purification
The preparation of subtilisin-modified ribonuclease and the separation of the peptide and protein components

references.authors: Connelly PR, Varadarajan R, Sturtevant JM, Richards FM
references.title: Thermodynamics of protein-peptide interactions in the ribonuclease S system studied by titration calorimetry

references.authors: Asai T, Wims LA, Morrison SL
references.title: An interaction between S-tag and S-protein derived from human ribonuclease 1 allows site-specific conjugation of an enzyme to an antibody for targeted drug delivery

label: S-tag
note: Residues 1-15 of mature bovine RNase A (UniProt P61823, precursor positions 27-41); binds S-protein with Kd ~10^-7 M to reconstitute RNase activity

provenance.sequence_source: UniProt:P61823 (RNAS1_BOVIN, Ribonuclease pancreatic, Bos taurus), mature chain residues 1-15 (precursor positions 27-41), 100% identity over 15 aa

value.notes: Calorimetry gives ~10^-6 to 10^-7 M; functional fusion system reports Kd <= 10^-9 M upon activity reconstitution

source.quote: thermodynamic characterization of S-peptide (1-15) binding to S-protein; establishes binding affinity in the 10^-6 to 10^-7 M range by calorimetry; confirms 15-aa truncation is the minimal active unit

functional_claims.label: 15-aa S15 truncation is the minimal unit sufficient for S-protein binding and activity reconstitution

value.activity: RNase activity reconstitution upon S-protein association

source.quote: residues 1-15 (S15) are sufficient for S-protein binding and ribonuclease activity reconstitution; introduces S-tag as affinity/detection tag; Kd <= 10^-9 M; D14N variant for nondenaturing purification; detection sensitivity >= 10^-16 mol

functional_claims.label: Detection sensitivity >= 10^-16 mol via S-protein-enzyme conjugate assay

value.assay: RNase activity-based detection using S-protein-HRP conjugate

functional_claims.label: Enables affinity purification via S-protein agarose resin

value.elution: low pH or chaotropic agent; D14N variant allows nondenaturing elution

source.quote: canonical reference for the Novagen commercial S-tag system; describes S-protein agarose purification, thrombin cleavage, dual His+S-tag strategy, and quantitative RNase activity detection

functional_claims.label: Functional in diverse recombinant expression hosts

value.notes: Used in E. coli pET-based systems and mammalian antibody-enzyme conjugate contexts

source.quote: demonstrates close variant with same 15-aa architecture but human origin for reduced immunogenicity in therapeutic antibody-enzyme conjugation

functional_claims.label: Human RNase 1-derived S-tag variant with same 15-aa architecture

value.application: antibody-enzyme conjugation for targeted drug delivery

source.quote: human RNase 1-derived S-tag variant; demonstrates close variant with same 15-aa architecture but human origin for reduced immunogenicity in therapeutic antibody-enzyme conjugation
